items.name: Rite of Ruin
items.description: Wrath and Ruin On spell cast, gain 2.5% Critical Strike Chance for 6 seconds, stacking up to 20%. Salvage the Wreckage Your spells have a chance equal to your Critical Strike Chance to grant you or your targeted ally a shield for for 3s.

items.name: Sword of Blossoming Dawn
items.description: Effervescence Gain + 1.2% Attack Speed for every 1% Heal and Shield Power you have. Peppermint On-Hit , heal the lowest health ally champion near you for , prioritizing lower health allies.

items.name: Hubris
items.description: Eminence Gain temporary AD based on champion kills on kill.

items.name: Shurelya's Battlesong
items.description: Inspiring Speech Grant nearby allies 30% Move Speed for 4 seconds.

items.name: Void Immolation
items.description: Immolate After taking or dealing damage, deal magic damage per second to nearby enemies for 5 seconds.

items.name: Wooglet's Witchcap
items.description: Magical Opus: Increases your total Ability Power by 50% (0) . Time Stop Enter Stasis for 2.5 seconds.

items.name: Overlord's Bloodmail
items.description: Tyranny Gain 2.5% of your bonus Health as Attack Damage . Retribution Gain up to 12% increased Attack Damage based on your percent missing Health.

items.name: Unending Despair
items.description: Anguish Every 4 seconds while in combat with champions, deal magic damage to nearby enemy champions and heal for 250% of the damage dealt.

items.name: Blackfire Torch
items.description: Baleful Blaze Damaging Abilities deals bonus magic damage for 3 seconds. Blackfire For each enemy champion, epic and large monster affected by your Baleful Blaze , gain 4% Ability Power .

items.name: Kaenic Rookern
items.description: Magebane After not taking magic damage for 15 seconds, gain a magic shield .

items.name: Dusk and Dawn
items.description: Spellblade (0s) After using an Ability, your next Attack deals bonus magic damage and heals you for On-Hit and then applies On-Hit effects an additional time.

items.name: Fiendhunter Bolts
items.description: Night Vigil Gain 30 Ultimate Ability Haste. Opening Barrage After casting your Ultimate, your next 3 basic attacks gain 50% Attack Speed and Critically Strike for 80% of your normal Critical Strike damage for 8 seconds. If an attack would already Critically Strike, instead it deals 15% bonus true damage .

items.name: Endless Hunger
items.description: Famine Gain Ability Haste. Feast When a champion that you damaged within 3 seconds dies, gain 15% Omnivamp for 8 seconds.

items.name: Actualizer
items.description: Mana Made Real (0s) For 8 seconds, your mana is Empowered. While Empowered, your spells cost 100% more Mana, you gain increased Ability damage, Shielding, and Healing, and your basic ability cooldowns progress 30% faster.

items.name: Hexoptics C44
items.description: Magnification Deal up to 10% increased damage with Attacks, based on how far away the enemy is (max damage at 500 range). Arcane Aim When a champion that you damaged within 3 seconds dies, gain 100 additional attack range for 8 seconds.

items.name: Bandlepipes
items.description: Fanfare Slowing or Immobilizing an enemy champion grants Fanfare for seconds. Fanfare grants you 20 Move Speed . While you have Fanfare, nearby allies, including yourself, gain Attack Speed .

items.name: Protoplasm Harness
items.description: Lifeline (0s) Taking damage that would reduce your Health below 30% causes you to gain maximum Health for 5 seconds, then heal Health over the duration. While regenerating Health, you gain 15% increased Size, 10% Move Speed, and 25% Tenacity.

items.name: Archangel's Staff
items.description: Awe Gain Ability Power equal to 1% bonus Mana. Manaflow (8s, max 5 charges) Landing Abilities grants 5 max Mana (doubled vs. champions). Transforms into Seraph's Embrace at 360 max Mana .

items.name: Manamune
items.description: Awe Gain bonus Attack Damage . Manaflow (8s, max 4 charges) Landing Attacks and Abilities grants 3 max Mana (doubled vs. champions). Transforms into Muramana at 360 max Mana .

items.name: Gluttonous Greaves
items.description: Slay Gain 1% Omnivamp on Champion takedown, stacking up to 6 times.

items.name: Boots of Swiftness
items.description: Fleetfooted Reduce the effectiveness of Slows by 25%.

items.name: Yun Tal Wildarrows
items.description: Practice Makes Lethal On-Attack, gain Critical Strike Chance permanently up to 25%. Flurry On-Attacking an enemy champion, gain 30% Attack Speed for 6 seconds (30 second cooldown). Attacks reduce this cooldown by 1 second, increased to 2 seconds for Critical Strikes.

items.name: Mortal Reminder
items.description: Grievous Wounds Dealing physical damage applies 40% Wounds to enemy champions for 3 seconds.

items.name: Lord Dominik's Regards
items.description: Giant Slayer Deal up to 15% bonus damage against champions based on their bonus Health. Maximum damage bonus reached at 1500 bonus Health.

items.name: Atma's Reckoning
items.description: Big Hands Gain 0-30% Critical Strike Chance, scaling with your bonus Health .

items.name: Phantom Dancer
items.description: Spectral Waltz Become Ghosted .

items.name: Plated Steelcaps
items.description: Plating Reduces incoming damage from Attacks by 10%.

items.name: Zeke's Convergence
items.description: Frostfire Tempest Casting your Ultimate summons a storm around you for 5 seconds. The storm deals 30 magic damage per second to enemy champions and Slows them by 30%.

items.name: Sterak's Gage
items.description: The Claws that Catch Gain bonus Attack Damage . Lifeline Taking damage that would reduce your Health below 30% grants a decaying Shield for 4.5 seconds.

items.name: Spirit Visage
items.description: Boundless Vitality Heals and Shields on you are increased by 25%.

items.name: Sunfire Aegis
items.description: Immolate After taking or dealing damage, deal magic damage per second to nearby enemies for 3 seconds.

items.name: Black Cleaver
items.description: Carve Dealing physical damage to champions reduces their Armor by 6% for 6 seconds. (stacks 5 times). Fervor Dealing physical damage grants 20 Move Speed for 2 seconds.

items.name: Bloodthirster
items.description: Ichorshield Convert excess healing from your Lifesteal to a Shield .

items.name: Experimental Hexplate
items.description: Hexcharged Gain 30 Ultimate Ability Haste. Overdrive After casting your Ultimate, gain 50% Attack Speed and 20% Move Speed for 8 seconds.

items.name: Ravenous Hydra
items.description: Cleave Attacks deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Ravenous Crescent Deal physical damage to enemies around you. Your Life Steal applies to this damage.

items.name: Thornmail
items.description: Thorns When struck by an Attack, deal magic damage to the attacker and apply 40% Wounds for 3 seconds if they are a champion.

items.name: Trinity Force
items.description: Spellblade After using an Ability, your next Attack deals bonus physical damage On-Hit . Quicken Attacking grants 20 Move Speed for 2 seconds.

items.name: Warmog's Armor
items.description: Warmog's Heart If you have 2000 bonus Health and have not taken damage within 8 seconds, restore Health per second. Warmog's Vitality Gain bonus Health equal to 12% of your Item Health ( 0 ).

items.name: Heartsteel
items.description: Colossal Consumption (0s) per target If an enemy champion is nearby for a few seconds, your next Attack against them deals 70 plus 6% of your max Health as bonus physical damage and grants 8% of the damage as max Health. Goliath For each 1000 max Health , gain 3% increased size, up to 30%.

items.name: Runaan's Hurricane
items.description: Wind's Fury Attacks fire bolts at 2 additional enemies near the target. Each bolt deals physical damage and applies On-Hit effects.

items.name: Statikk Shiv
items.description: Electrospark Your Energized Attacks fire chain lightning, applying On-Hit effects and dealing magic damage to nearby targets. Electroshock Basic Attacks grant extra Energized stacks.

items.name: Rabadon's Deathcap
items.description: Magical Opus Increases your total Ability Power by 30% .

items.name: Wit's End
items.description: Fray Attacks deal bonus magic damage On-Hit .

items.name: Rapid Firecannon
items.description: Sharpshooter Your Energized Attack deals 40 bonus magic damage and gains 35% bonus Attack Range.

items.name: Stormrazor
items.description: Energized Moving and Attacking generates an Energized Attack . Bolt Your Energized Attack applies bonus magic damage and grants 45% Movement Speed for 1.5 seconds.

items.name: Lich Bane
items.description: Spellblade After using an Ability, your next Attack deals bonus magic damage On-Hit .

items.name: Banshee's Veil
items.description: Annul Grants a Spell Shield that blocks the next enemy Ability.

items.name: Redemption
items.description: Intervention Restore 150 - 350 Health to allied units and deal 10% max Health true damage to enemy champions after 2.5 seconds.

items.name: Knight's Vow
items.description: Sacrifice While near your Worthy ally, take 12% of the damage they receive and heal for 10% of the damage they deal to champions. Pledge (0s) Designate an ally as Worthy .

items.name: Frozen Heart
items.description: Winter's Caress Reduce the Attack Speed of nearby champions by 20% .

items.name: Nashor's Tooth
items.description: Icathian Bite Attacks deal bonus magic damage On-Hit .

items.name: Rylai's Crystal Scepter
items.description: Rimefrost Damaging Abilities Slow enemies by 30% for 1 second.

items.name: Malignance
items.description: Scorn Gain 20 Ultimate Ability Haste. Hatefog Damaging a champion with your Ultimate burns the ground beneath them for 3s, dealing magic damage per second and reducing their Magic Resist .

items.name: Winter's Approach
items.description: Awe Gain Health . Manaflow (8s, max 4 charges) Landing Attacks and Abilities grant 3 max Mana (doubled vs. champions). Transforms into Fimbulwinter at 360 max Mana .

items.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade
items.description: Wrath Attacks deal 30 bonus magic damage On-Hit . Seething Strike Attacks grant 8% Attack Speed for 3 seconds. (stacks 4 times). While fully stacked, every third Attack applies On-Hit effects twice.

items.name: Cryptbloom
items.description: Life from Death When a champion that you damaged within 3 seconds dies, a nova spreads from their corpse that heals .

items.name: Mercurial Scimitar
items.description: ACTIVE Quicksilver Removes all crowd control debuffs (excluding Airborne ) and grants Move Speed.

items.name: Youmuu's Ghostblade
items.description: Haunt Gain Move Speed while out of combat. Wraith Step Gain Move Speed and Ghosting for seconds.

items.name: Randuin's Omen
items.description: Resilience Receive 30% less damage from Critical Strikes. Humility Slow nearby enemies by 70% for 2 seconds.

items.name: Hextech Gunblade
items.description: ACTIVE (0s) Lightning Bolt Shocks the target enemy champion, dealing magic damage and slowing them by 25% for 1.5 seconds.

items.name: Hextech Rocketbelt
items.description: Supersonic Dash in target direction, unleashing missiles that deal magic damage .

items.name: Blade of The Ruined King
items.description: Mist's Edge Attacks deal a percentage of enemy's current Health as bonus physical damage On-Hit . Clawing Shadows Attacking a champion 3 times Slows them by 30% for 1 second.

items.name: Maw of Malmortius
items.description: Lifeline Taking magic damage that would reduce your Health below 30% grants a magic damage Shield for 3 seconds and 10% Omnivamp until end of combat.

items.name: Zhonya's Hourglass
items.description: Time Stop Enter Stasis for 2.5 seconds.

items.name: Ionian Boots of Lucidity
items.description: Ionian Insight Gain 10 Summoner Spell Haste.

items.name: Spear of Shojin
items.description: Dragonforce Gain 25 Basic Ability Haste. Focused Will Dealing damage with Abilities increases your Champion's Ability and Passive damage by 3% for 6 seconds. (stacks 4 times).

items.name: Morellonomicon
items.description: Grievous Wounds Dealing magic damage to champions applies 40% Wounds for 3 seconds.

items.name: Umbral Glaive
items.description: Nightstalker After being unseen by enemies briefly, your next attack against a champion deals an additional true damage . Blackout When you are near enemy Stealth Wards and traps, reveal them briefly. While revealing wards, your attacks deal bonus damage to them.

items.name: Hullbreaker
items.description: Skipper Every fifth Attack against champions and epic monsters deals bonus physical damage , increased against Structures. Boarding Party Nearby allied siege and super minions gain Armor and Magic Resist .

items.name: Locket of the Iron Solari
items.description: Devotion Grant nearby allies a 290 - 360 Shield that decays over 2.5 seconds.

items.name: Mikael's Blessing
items.description: Purify Remove all crowd control debuffs (excluding Airborne and Suppression ) from an ally champion and restore 100 - 250 Health .

items.name: Terminus
items.description: Shadow Attacks deal 30 bonus magic damage On-Hit . Juxtaposition Alternate between Light and Dark Attacks against champions: Light Attacks grant Armor and Magic Resist for 5s. Dark Attacks grant 10% Armor Penetration and Magic Penetration for 5s.

items.name: Ardent Censer
items.description: Sanctify Healing or Shielding an ally enhances you both for 6 seconds, granting 25% Attack Speed and 20 magic damage On-Hit .

items.name: Essence Reaver
items.description: Spellblade After using an Ability, your next Attack deals bonus physical damage and grants Mana On-Hit .

items.name: Dead Man's Plate
items.description: Shipwrecker While moving, build up to 20 bonus Move Speed . Your next Attack discharges built up Move Speed to deal bonus physical damage . Unsinkable Reduce the effectiveness of Slows by 15%.

items.name: Titanic Hydra
items.description: Cleave Attacks deal physical damage on-hit and to enemies behind the target. Titanic Crescent Empower your next Cleave to deal bonus physical damage On-Hit and deal bonus physical damage to enemies behind the target.

items.name: Edge of Night
items.description: Annul Grants a Spell Shield that blocks the next enemy Ability.

items.name: Spectral Cutlass
items.description: Active - Soul Anchor (0s) Mark your current location. After 4 seconds, return to that location. You may recast at any point during Soul Anchor's duration to return to your marked location early.

items.name: Imperial Mandate
items.description: Coordinated Fire (0s) per target Slowing or Immobilizing an enemy champion marks them for 5 seconds. Ally champion damage detonates the mark, dealing magic damage equal to 10% of current health .

items.name: Force of Nature
items.description: Steadfast Gain 70 Magic Resist and 6% bonus Move Speed after taking magic damage from Champions 8 times.

items.name: Horizon Focus
items.description: Hypershot Dealing Ability damage to champions at 600 range or greater Reveals them for 6 seconds. Focus When Hypershot is triggered, Reveal all other enemy champions within 1400 range of them for 3 seconds.

items.name: Cosmic Drive
items.description: Spelldance Dealing magic or true damage to champions grants Move Speed for 4 seconds.

items.name: Riftmaker
items.description: Void Corruption For each second in combat with enemy champions, deal 2% bonus damage, up to 8%. At maximum strength, gain Omnivamp . Void Infusion Gain 2% of your bonus Health as Ability Power .

items.name: Shadowflame
items.description: Cinderbloom Magic and true damage Critically Strikes enemies below 40% Health, dealing 20% increased damage.

items.name: Stormsurge
items.description: Stormraider Dealing 25% of a champion's maximum Health within 2.5s applies Squall to them. Squall After 2 seconds, deal magic damage . If the target dies before Squall triggers, it damages nearby enemies.

items.name: Death's Dance
items.description: Ignore Pain A percentage of damage taken is dealt to you over 3 seconds instead. Defy When a champion that you damaged within 3 seconds dies, cleanse Ignore Pain's remaining damage and restore Health over 2 seconds.

items.name: Chempunk Chainsword
items.description: Hackshorn Dealing physical damage applies 40% Wounds to enemy champions for 3 seconds.

items.name: Sundered Sky
items.description: Lightshield Strike Your first Attack against a champion Critically Strikes and restores Health .

items.name: Staff of Flowing Water
items.description: Rapids Healing or Shielding an ally grants you both 40 Ability Power and 15 Ability Haste for 6 seconds.

items.name: Moonstone Renewer
items.description: Starlit Grace Healing or shielding an ally chains the effect to another ally (excluding yourself), healing 30% or shielding 35% of the original amount.

items.name: Echoes of Helia
items.description: Soul Siphon Gain 35% of pre-mitigation damage dealt to champions as Soul Charges. Healing or Shielding an ally consumes all Soul Charges to restore Health .

items.name: Dawncore
items.description: First Light Gain 2% Heal and Shield Power and 10 Ability Power per 100% Base Mana Regen.

items.name: Stridebreaker
items.description: Cleave Attacks deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Breaking Shockwave Deal physical damage and Slow nearby enemies by 35%. Gain 35% decaying Move Speed per champion hit for 3 seconds.

items.name: Liandry's Torment
items.description: Torment Damaging Abilities burn enemies for 2% max Health magic damage per second for 3 seconds. Suffering For each second in combat with enemy champions, deal 2% bonus damage, up to 6%.

items.name: Luden's Echo
items.description: Echo Damaging Abilities fire 6 Echoes that deal bonus magic damage to the target and nearby enemies. Remaining Echoes fire on the primary target, dealing 20% damage.

items.name: Rod of Ages
items.description: Timeless This item gains 10 Health , 30 Mana and 3 Ability Power every 60 seconds up to 10 times. Upon reaching max stacks, gain a level. Eternity Taking damage from champions restores 10% of the damage as Mana . Casting an ability heals for 25% of Mana spent.

items.name: Iceborn Gauntlet
items.description: Spellblade After using an Ability, your next Attack deals bonus physical damage On-Hit and creates a frost field for 2s that Slows .

items.name: Hollow Radiance
items.description: Immolate After taking or dealing damage, deal magic damage per second to nearby enemies for 3 seconds. Desolate Killing an enemy deals magic damage around them.

items.name: Jak'Sho, The Protean
items.description: Voidborn Resilience After 5 seconds of champion combat, increase your bonus Armor and Magic Resist by 30% until end of combat.

items.name: Kraken Slayer
items.description: Bring It Down Every third Attack deals bonus physical damage On-Hit , increased based on their missing Health.

items.name: Immortal Shieldbow
items.description: Lifeline Taking damage that would reduce your Health below 30% grants a Shield for 3 seconds.

items.name: Navori Flickerblade
items.description: Transcendence Attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by 15% of their remaining cooldown.

items.name: The Collector
items.description: Death Your damage executes champions that are below 5% Health. Taxes Champion kills grant 25 bonus gold .

items.name: Eclipse
items.description: Ever Rising Moon Hitting a champion with 2 separate Attacks or Abilities within 2 seconds grants you a Shield for 2 seconds.

items.name: Serylda's Grudge
items.description: Bitter Cold Damaging Abilities Slow enemies below 50% Health by 30% for 1 second.

items.name: Serpent's Fang
items.description: Shield Reaver Damaging an enemy champion reduces Shields they gain by % for 3 seconds. If they were not already affected by Shield Reaver , reduce Shields on them by %.

items.name: Axiom Arc
items.description: Flux When a champion that you damaged within 3 seconds dies, refund some of your Ultimate Ability's total cooldown.

items.name: Profane Hydra
items.description: Cleave Attacks deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Heretical Cleave Deal physical damage around you.

items.name: Voltaic Cyclosword
items.description: Galvanize Damaging an Enemy Champions with an ability triggers Energized if it is ready. Firmament Your Energized Attack deals % target's Current Health as bonus physical damage and grants you bonus Lethality for 4 seconds.

items.name: Bloodletter's Curse
items.description: Vile Decay Dealing magic damage with abilities or passives to champions reduces their Magic Resist by 7.5% for 6 seconds, up to 30%.

items.name: Abyssal Mask
items.description: Unmake Nearby enemy champions take 12% more magic damage .

items.name: Golden Spatula
items.description: Doing Something You are permanently On Fire! "It must do something... Declined, it does EVERYTHING"
